kirundi.generate_printable_practice_worksheets: Kora impapuro z'imyimenyerezo zishobora gucapurwa zifise impfunguzo z'inyishu. Hitamwo ingingo, igiharuro c'ibibazo, hanyuma ucapure.
kirundi.include_answer_key_on_a_separate_page: Shiramwo urupfunguzo rw'inyishu ku rupapuro rutandukanye
kirundi.percent_comes_from_the_latin_per_centu: "Percent" iva mu Kilatini "per centum" — "kuri ijana." Rero 25% bisigura 25 kuri 100, canke 25/100. Ikimenyetso % cakuze kiva ku majambo magufi "per c." mu vyandiko vy'ubudandaji vy'Abataliyani vyo mu kinjana ca 15.
kirundi.a_pizza_is_a_perfect_fraction_model_be: Pizza ni icitegererezo c'igice gitunganye kuko ari uruziga (rero ibice vyose biva mu kigazi), ibice vyoroshe kubara, kandi icitegererezo gihuye n'insobanuro z'imibare zisanzwe: igice n/d ni n ibice bingana muri vyose d ibice bingana.
kirundi.two_pizzas_can_only_be_combined_if_the: Pizza zibiri zishobora guhuzwa gusa nimba zaciwe mu bice vy'ubunini bumwe. Igiharuro co hasi gitandukanye = ibice vy'ubunini butandukanye = ntibishobora guhuzwa ako kanya. Igiharuro co hasi gisangiwe bisigura neza "ibice vy'ubunini bumwe."
kirundi.a_batting_average_like_333_means_1_3_o: Impuzandengo yo gukubita nka .333 bisigura 1/3 vy'ibikubitwa bitanga igikubita. ERA y'uwuterera, kw'ijana bwo kuba-ku-base, kw'ijana bwo gukubita — vyose ni ibice. Baseball ni wo mukino wa mbere wamamaje ubwoko bw'iki ciyumviro c'imibare, guhera mu myaka ya 1850.
kirundi.usually_means_a_small_arithmetic_error: Akenshi bisigura ikosa rito ry'imibare (akr., yagwije nabi) canke ntiyaworoteje. Erekana Cheat Sheet — bashobora kugenzura akazi kabo intambwe ku yindi. Bashishikarize kwemeza n'uburyo butandukanye (bakebe imbere, canke bakoreshe icitegererezo gitandukanye).
kirundi.you_don_t_have_to_be_the_expert_use_th: Ntutegerezwa kuba incabwenge! Koresha Tab Guide na Worked Examples — bisigura uburyo neza. Iciza: erekana "reka tubimenye hamwe." Ushobora kwiga hamwe n'umwana wawe. Tab y'Amajambo ifise akamaro no ku bantu bakuru.
kirundi.look_at_the_standards_tab_to_see_which: Raba tab ya Standards kugira ngo urabe amahame ya CCSS bakwiye kumenya ku mwaka wabo. Tab ya Mastery yerekana iterambere. Ku kugenzura kwihuta: bashobora (a) gushushanya icitegererezo ca 3/4, (b) kuvuga igice kingana na 1/2, (c) kugereranya 2/3 na 3/4 no gusigura? Izo test zitatu zikubiyemwo ivyitezwe vyinshi vy'igice vya K-5.
kirundi.the_why_of_learning_recruiting_interes: "IGITUMA" c'ukwiga — gukwega ishaka, kubandanya inguvu, kwiyobora
kirundi.modern_american_math_curriculum_solidi: Integuro y'imibare y'Abanyamerika y'ubu ibandanya ikikije icitegererezo c'uburyo-imbere IES Practice Guide inyuma yanenze.
kirundi.predictable_routines_limit_visual_clut: Imirimo ishobora guhanurwa. Gabanya urujijo ruboneka. Emera igihe congera co gutunganya.
kirundi.set_a_personal_daily_and_weekly_target: Shiraho intumbero bwite ya buri musi n'iy'indwi. Kurikirana iterambere ryawe. Imyimenyerezo ibandanya itsinda inguvu ku kubika.
kirundi.generate_a_customizable_worksheet_with: Kora urupapuro rw'akazi rushobora guhindurwa rufise urupfunguzo rw'inyishu.
kirundi.click_pieces_to_add_them_to_your_works: Fyonda ibice kugira ngo uvyongereko ku kibanza cawe c'akazi. Gerageza gukora ishusho, kwubaka ibigazi, canke kurondera ukungana mu buryo buboneka.
kirundi.which_term_matches_this_definition: Ni ijambo ikihe rihuye n'iyi nsiguro?
kirundi.a_4_point_holistic_rubric_for_evaluati: Rubric y'amanota 4 yuzuye yo gusuzuma akazi k'umunyeshure ku bibazo vy'igice. Buri rwego rufise ibipimo n'inyishu y'akarorero. Ifise akamaro ku isuzuma rya portfolio n'impanuro.
kirundi.a_baseball_batting_average_like_333_me: Impuzandengo yo gukubita ya baseball nka .333 bisigura uwukubita aronka igikubita 1/3 c'igihe. Kw'ijana bwo gutera-ubuntu bwa .800 bisigura 4 muri buri kugerageza 5 vyinjira.
kirundi.earn_xp_from_correct_answers_and_badge: Ronka XP uva ku nyishu nziza n'ibimenyetso kugira ngo uduge urwego. Buri rwego rwugurura izina rishasha.
kirundi.a_fraction_is_a_number_with_a_size_eac: Igice ni igiharuro gifise ubunini. Buri mukanda ni cuzuye kimwe mu bugari, rero uko ibara rigera ni agaciro. Ugurura grid y'igiharuro-co-hasi-gisangiwe kugira ngo urabe ibice bingana biterana ku murongo umwe.
kirundi.some_strips_show_a_different_number_of: ⚠ Imikanda imwe yerekana igiharuro gitandukanye c'ibice ariko UBUNINI BUMWE. Ukungana bisigura ubunini bungana, atari igiharuro kingana c'ibice.
kirundi.explain_how_count_num_den_determines_w: Sigura uko igiharuro × (hejuru/hasi) kigena nimba ugeze kuri 1.
